note: The revoked set is DERIVED: parse revocation.ttl and take every odrld:revokedPolicy object (profile §4.3/§7 — the evaluator itself performs no I/O; the caller assembles the set from published odrld:Revocation statements). An implementation that cannot parse the statement fails this case.
title: revoked hop (odrld:Revocation → the revoked set) → deny
